name: Rebill
description: Argentine payments orchestration and recurring billing platform for cross-country multi-currency revenue ops in LatAm.

seo.title: Rebill — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: Rebill: Argentine payments orchestration and recurring billing platform for cross-country multi-currency revenue ops in LatAm.

when_to_use: Recurring billing across Argentina, Mexico, and Brazil from one platform
Multi-currency subscription management for LatAm SaaS
PSP routing and failover for Latin American payment flows

pros: Cross-country orchestration for Argentina, Brazil, Mexico
cons: Outside LatAm the value drops sharply
PSP coverage deepest in a few core markets
review.verdict: Best orchestration plus billing pick for LatAm SaaS and subscription merchants; not a global-first platform.
review.best_for: Subscription businesses operating across Argentina, Brazil, Mexico, and Chile with multi-currency needs.
review.not_for: Merchants whose GMV is concentrated in EU or North America.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
